title: patchAccountsAccountNumberOrdersId

gtc-date.description: The date in which a GTD order will expire. Can only be provided if time-in-force is GTD.

order-type.description:
The type of order in regards to the price. i.e.
                                    `Limit`, `Market`, `Marketable Limit`, `Notional Market`, `Stop` or `Stop Limit`

stop-trigger.description: The price trigger at which a stop or stop-limit order becomes valid.

time-in-force.description:
The length in time before the order expires. i.e.
                                       `Day`, `Ext`, `Ext Overnight`, `GTC`, `GTC Ext`, `GTC Ext Overnight`, `GTD` or `IOC`

price.description: The price of the Order. Required for limit and stop-limit orders.

price-effect.description: If pay or receive payment for placing the order. i.e. `Credit` or `Debit`

value.description: The notional value of the Order, required for notional market orders.

value-effect.description: If pay or receive payment for placing the notional market order. i.e. `Credit` or `Debit`

automated-source.description: If the order was placed from an automated source

preflight-id.description: Transient order identifier used for matching preflight errors to an individual order

source.description: The source the order is coming from

cancel-at.description: Latest time an order should be canceled at

action.description:
The action in which the trigger is enacted. i.e.
                                    `cancel` and `route`

instrument-type.description:
The instrument's type in relation to the condition. e.g. \
                                              `Equity` or `Future`

symbol.description:
The symbol to apply the condition to. \
                                      e.g Stock Ticker Symbol `AAPL` or the TW Future Symbol `/ESZ9`

comparator.description:
How to compare against the threshold. \
                                        Currently Supports `gte` (Greater than or Equal To) or `lte` (Less than or Equal to)

indicator.description: The indicator for the trigger, currently only supports `last`

threshold.description: The price at which the condition triggers.

instrument-type.description: The instrument's type in relation to the symbol.

quantity.description: The Ratio quantity in relation to the symbol

quantity-direction.description: The quantity direction(ie Long or Short) in relation to the symbol

symbol.description:
The symbol to apply the condition to. \
                                      e.g. Stock Ticker Symbol `AAPL` or the TW Future Symbol `/ESZ9`

route-after.description: Earliest time an order should route at

description:
Edit price and execution properties of a live order by replacement. Subsequent fills of the original order
      will abort the replacement.
